use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE WITH OR WITHOUT AURA

indications.text:
RELPAX is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in adults.
Limitations of Use:
 Use only if a clear diagnosis of migraine has been established. If a patient has no response to the first migraine
attack treated with RELPAX, reconsider the diagnosis of migraine before REL...

of migraine before REL...

RELPAX is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in adults.
RELPAX is not intended for the prophylactic therapy of migraine or for use in the
management of hemiplegic or basilar migraine (see CONTRAINDICATIONS). Safety
and effectiveness of RELPAX Tablets have not been est...
